name: Russia
headline: Russia FLOOR-STATE CONFIRMATION at 0.0 / Critical. May 18 mass strike package documented (8,065 kamikaze drones, 316 guided aerial bombs, 2,716 shelling attacks; Odesa residential buildings, kindergarten, lyceum, police station hit). Belarus military nuclear-weapons drills launched May 18. Xi-Putin Beijing summit underway (Putin framing China-Russia as 'stabilising force'; joint statement pending May 20). Conduct continuation; floor sustained.

BND.rationale: Floor sustained. Civilian-residential targeting (Odesa kindergarten, lyceum, residential buildings) is canonical IHL-violation evidence. Belarus nuclear drills = nuclear escalation signaling.

evidence.finding: May 18: 1,220 personnel losses; 316 guided aerial bombs, 8,065 kamikaze drones, 2,716 shelling attacks. Strikes on Odesa residential buildings, kindergarten, lyceum, police station.
May 18 mass-strike package documented; Belarus launched military nuclear-weapons drills.
Xi-Putin Beijing summit May 19-20. Putin: China-Russia as 'stabilising force in world.'

keyEvidence: May 18 mass strike: 8,065 drones + 316 guided bombs + 2,716 shelling on civilian targets.
Odesa residential buildings, kindergarten, lyceum, police station targeted.
Belarus military nuclear-weapons drills launched May 18.
Xi-Putin Beijing summit reinforces strategic-alignment posture.
rationale: Floor confirmation at 0.0. May 18 mass strike package and Belarus nuclear drills are conduct-continuation events; already at floor, no downward movement available. Math: 8/8 = 1.0 → ((1.0-1)/4)*100 = 0.0.
whyHeadline: Russia floor sustained; May 18 mass strike on Odesa civilian targets + Belarus nuclear drills.

dominantDimension.note: BND remains canonical floor-anchor (civilian-residential targeting + nuclear signaling).

nextForwardSignal.label: Xi-Putin joint statement text (Ukraine language + dual-use supply chain)

watches: Ukraine retaliation pattern post-May 18 oil refinery strike
boundaryWatchResolution: Floor state; no boundary movement available.
